title: Crash with struct combined with parameters

features.name: packed struct typedef with logic member
features.description: Code should include a typedef for a packed struct containing a logic member
features.snippet: typedef struct packed { logic foo; } some_struct_t;

features.name: child module hierarchical struct field access
features.description: Code should include a child module accessing a struct field from a parent module via hierarchical reference

features.name: parameterized parent module with struct signal
features.description: Code should include a parent module with a parameter and a struct-typed signal that is accessed by a child module

features.name: non-default parameter instantiation
features.description: Code should include a parameterized module instantiated with a non-default parameter value
